RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT ERIC HUNTER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- Demurrer sustained with leave to amend to allege facts showing at-will tenancy. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/PHA/AC) Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220
